textByHash.a579d6aed41d33c6540aaf5ec63cad77e2e55aae: The city is flourishing, largely thanks to you. There's still some mistrust for the Iorwerth clan, but overall I'd say it's been over a thousand years since our people were doing this well.
textByHash.dad083cb8f8f05dd34eac7d02e0312cdf864ba7f: I still mourn Glarial every day, until the end of time a part of me will be missing, never to be replaced.
textByHash.16aa5ac610f663f4cc94a76db2184ba590c2bf12: But I know now that I can't let that impact the elves here. Many of them never even knew their former queen. My grief is mine alone, they need not bear it.
textByHash.ca833beef4116d9d90ed75b730ce0afadd65d3da: To them, I'm trying my best to be a leader they deserve, to correct the mistakes of the past. Lord Iorwerth believed we were nothing without Seren. We need to prove that we have a future with her gone.
textByHash.b025e366499076dd1522bae8beb383bc849a0802: Thankfully I have the other elders to help this time. Ruling is not as hard when you share out the responsiblities.
textByHash.99f4222cb4416b6e8bde2ee593316c77045b2755: And we are glad to have you here with us. None of this would have been possible without you.
